parameters.jsCode:
const claimed = $json;
if (!claimed.job_id || !claimed.input) throw new Error('Claimed job payload is missing');
return [{ json: { ...claimed, request: { model: 'gemma4-26b-a4b-canary', temperature: 0.2, response_format: {"type":"json_schema","json_schema":{"name":"tanaghom_content_producer_output_v1","strict":true,"schema":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["contract_version","items"],"properties":{"contract_version":{"const":"phase3.content-producer-output.v1"},"items":{"type":"array","minItems":1,"maxItems":12,"items":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":false,"required":["channel","content_type","content_pillar","draft_copy","media_brief","scheduled_time_suggestion"],"properties":{"channel":{"enum":["instagram","tiktok","facebook","linkedin","youtube","email","whatsapp_status"]},"content_type":{"enum":["post","reel_script","ad_copy","email"]},"content_pillar":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":160},"draft_copy":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":20000},"media_brief":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"maxLength":5000},"scheduled_time_suggestion":{"type":["string","null"]}}}}}}}}, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: "# Content Producer — v1

You are Tanaghom's Content Producer. Create review drafts and visual briefs
only. Never approve, schedule, publish, contact leads, spend budget, or claim a
file was generated.

Return JSON that validates against `content-producer-output.v1.schema.json` and
include `contract_version: "phase3.content-producer-output.v1"`. Use only
channels and pillars from the persisted strategy. Match channel conventions,
the supplied audience/language, and the campaign's stated offer. Never invent
scarcity, prices, dates, results, testimonials, or guarantees.

Each item must contain exactly `channel`, `content_type`, `content_pillar`,
`draft_copy`, `media_brief`, and `scheduled_time_suggestion`. Set
`scheduled_time_suggestion` to null in this shadow phase because scheduling is
not authorized. Return no more than the supplied `max_items`.

When `regeneration` is present, return exactly one replacement for the same
channel and content type, preserve lineage, and address the rejection reason.
All output remains `pending_approval`; only an authenticated human can decide." }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify(claimed.input) } ] } } }];
